hyperedges.label: Development Sprints 1-4

Booking pipeline — lock, create appointment, return token

Staff Authentication Pipeline (User → NextAuth → JWT → Role Enforcement)
Booking pipeline — lock, create appointment, create ledger, generate token, audit
Staff Portal — role-based dashboard, calendar, manual booking, appointments, slots, analytics
Patient journey — search → book → token → manage/check-in → review

Staff Portal

properties.description: Complete composition of the Staff Dashboard page: sidebar nav + top header + stat cards + schedule + quick actions + performance + activity feed

properties.description: Staff clinic operations workflow: access portal → manage bookings → monitor activity → track performance metrics
properties.ux_loop: Staff views dashboard → monitors today's schedule → uses quick actions to book/view/manage → observes real-time activity feed → checks performance utilization

properties.description: Role-based access control model where nav items are filtered by staff role (receptionist, clinic_admin, system_manager)

roles_with_access.CLINIC_RECEPTION: Dashboard, Calendar, Manual Booking, Appointments, Activity
roles_with_access.CLINIC_ADMIN: All reception features + Slot Management, Analytics, Settings

attributes.description: Login/authentication screen for DoctA clinic booking app
New flow home/dashboard screen with search and navigation
New booking form with patient details and appointment parameters
Clinic selection view in new booking flow showing available clinics
Search results showing available slots and clinic options
Booking confirmation summary with appointment details
Manual booking flow step 1 — initial patient/clinic selection
Manual booking flow step 2 — slot selection and confirmation
Sprint 5 calendar view for date-based appointment browsing
Sprint 5 booking wizard step 1 — details and slot selection
Set of 10 QA screenshots covering login, new booking flow, manual booking flow, and S5 booking flow

properties.description: UI screenshot of the staff dashboard main page of DoctA clinic booking system. Shows sidebar navigation, stat cards, today's schedule, quick actions, performance metrics, and recent activity feed.
properties.layout: Two-column layout with left sidebar and main content area. Sidebar is collapsible with nav items. Main area has top header bar with Staff Portal label, theme toggle, notification bell, and user avatar.
visual_elements: Sidebar navigation with active state indicator (green left border highlight)
4 stat cards in a grid showing Today's Appointments, Checked In, Upcoming, Total Bookings
Today's Schedule card with appointment rows showing time, patient name, provider, service, modality badge (Video/In-Clinic), status badge (Checked In/Booked)
Quick Actions card with New Booking, View Calendar, Manage Slots buttons
Performance card with utilization progress bar, completed/cancelled/no-shows/available mini-stat boxes
Recent Activity feed with colored left-border icons for each event type
Animated ping dot indicator on Today's Schedule header
properties.primary_color_scheme: Emerald green (#10b981) primary, with blue, amber, purple accent gradients on stat cards. Clean white/light gray backgrounds.
properties.design_style: Rounded cards with subtle shadows, gradient top borders, hover scale transitions on stat cards, slide/fade animations on quick action arrow icons, Tailwind CSS utility classes
properties.ux_flow: Staff logs in → lands on Dashboard overview → can navigate to Calendar/Book/Appointments/Slots/Analytics/Admin via sidebar → can perform quick actions (New Booking, View Calendar, Manage Slots) → sees real-time activity feed → can sign out from sidebar avatar section

properties.grid_columns: 4 on large screens, 2 on small, 1 on mobile

sections: Header with animated ping dot indicator and 'View all' link to /staff/dashboard/appointments
Appointment list with rows showing time (h:mm a), patient name, provider name (Dr.), service name, modality badge (Video/In-Clinic), status badge (Checked In/Booked)

properties.interaction: Each button has hover scale effect on icon and slide-in arrow animation

metric_boxes: Available slots (sky blue, with Phone icon)

properties.left_content: Mobile hamburger menu (lg:hidden), ShieldCheck icon with 'Staff Portal' label
properties.right_content: Theme toggle button, NotificationBell component, user avatar with name

properties.role_based_access: Receptionist sees 5 nav items, Clinic Admin sees 8, System Manager sees 9
properties.purpose: Clinic staff operations hub for managing appointments, bookings, slots, and clinic analytics

properties.description: Staff can book appointments on behalf of phone-in patients

attributes.description: Logo image for the DoctA project — likely includes project name wordmark and/or icon mark in a distinct color palette; standard branding asset for visual identity
After successful login, user lands on the home screen
Home screen provides both new booking and manual booking entry points
From home, user initiates a new booking
Home screen provides access to calendar-based S5 booking flow
After filling booking details, user selects a clinic
After clinic selection, available slots are displayed
After slot selection, booking confirmation is shown
Manual booking wizard step 1 proceeds to step 2
From calendar date selection, user enters booking step 1

properties.description: The dashboard page contains Performance summary card with utilization bar and metrics
The dashboard page contains Quick Actions card with three action buttons
The dashboard page contains Recent Activity feed at the bottom
The dashboard page contains a sidebar navigation panel with role-filtered nav items
The dashboard page contains four stat cards in a responsive grid
The dashboard page contains Today's Schedule card with appointment rows
The dashboard page has a top header bar with controls
Sidebar navigation is part of the Staff Portal concept
Today's Schedule is a core feature of the Staff Portal
Quick Actions New Booking button provides entry to Manual Booking flow
